seoTitle: Hamilton Hill vs Hammond Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Hamilton Hill and Hammond Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Hamilton Hill vs Hammond Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hamilton Hill and Hammond Park.
heading: Hamilton Hill vs Hammond Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hamilton Hill, Western Australia and Hammond Park, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hamilton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Hammond Park (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hamilton Hill or Hammond Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hamilton Hill has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Hammond Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hamilton Hill scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Hammond Park scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hamilton Hill or Hammond Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hamilton Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
